category_sources: source_facts.description says open and reliable container runtime; official containerd docs describe project-level documentation for containerd.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is containerd; official repository is containerd/containerd.
docs_sources: Official containerd documentation site has a dedicated /docs/ section with overview and getting started links.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already contains https://github.com/containerd/containerd, so repo is returned as null per instructions.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies a container runtime; official docs and repo identify containerd as the container runtime project.
